# MoBud

MoBud is a free, local-first mobility administration app for Europe.

It helps users track rides, commutes, vehicle costs, receipts, maintenance and monthly reports.

Positioning:
- Free to use
- No account required
- No subscription
- No central MoBud server with user mobility data
- Local-first data with optional Google Drive backup
- Practical mobility and vehicle administration
- Reports for rides, vehicle costs and receipts

Key pages:
- Homepage: https://mobud.app/
- App: https://mobud.app/app/
- FAQ: https://mobud.app/faq/
- GitHub: https://github.com/studiosampersand/MoBud

Supported public site languages for this release:
- English: https://mobud.app/?lang=en
- Nederlands: https://mobud.app/?lang=nl
- Français: https://mobud.app/?lang=fr
- Español: https://mobud.app/?lang=es
- Italiano: https://mobud.app/?lang=it
- Português: https://mobud.app/?lang=pt
- Svenska: https://mobud.app/?lang=sv
- Norsk: https://mobud.app/?lang=no
- Dansk: https://mobud.app/?lang=da
